growth.title: Flynas profit falls on higher fuel and maintenance costs
growth.description: Net profit at Saudi budget airline Flynas took a hit in the first quarter of 2026 due to higher fuel and maintenance costs. The bottom line declined 20 percent to SAR118 million ($31.3 million) in the quarter ended March 31, from SAR148 million a year earlier, the carrier said in a statement to the Saudi stock […]
